title: Purpose Investments Inc. Announces Final February 2026 Distribution Rate for Purpose High Interest Savings Fund, Purpose US Cash Fund, Purpose Cash Management Fund, and Purpose USD Cash Management Fund
content:
TORONTO, Feb.  24, 2026  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Purpose Investments Inc. announced today the final February 2026 distribution rates for Purpose High Interest Savings Fund, Purpose US Cash Fund, Purpose Cash Management Fund, and Purpose USD Cash Management Fund.

The following table reflects the final distribution amounts for the month of February. Ex-distribution date is February 25, 2026.

Open-End Fund Ticker SymbolFinal distribution per unitRecord DatePayable DateDistribution FrequencyPurpose USD Cash Management Fund – ETF UnitsMNU.UUS $ 0.284102/25/202603/03/2026MonthlyPurpose Cash Management Fund – ETF UnitsMNY$ 0.188602/25/202603/03/2026MonthlyPurpose High Interest Savings Fund – ETF UnitsPSA$ 0.081902/25/202603/03/2026MonthlyPurpose US Cash Fund – ETF UnitsPSU.UUS $ 0.269902/25/202603/03/2026Monthly

About Purpose Investments Inc.

Purpose Investments Inc. is an asset management company with more than $30 billion in assets under management. Purpose Investments has an unrelenting focus on client-centric innovation, and offers a range of managed and quantitative investment products. Purpose Investments is led by well-known entrepreneur Som Seif and is a division of Purpose Unlimited, an independent technology-driven financial services company.

For further information please contact:
Keera Hart
Keera.Hart@kaiserpartners.com
905-580-1257

Commissions, trailing commissions, management fees and expenses all may be associated with investment fund investments. Please read the prospectus and other disclosure documents before investing. Investment funds are not covered by the Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation or any other government deposit insurer. There can be no assurance that the full amount of your investment in a fund will be returned to you. If the securities are purchased or sold on a stock exchange, you may pay more or receive less than the current net asset value. Investment funds are not guaranteed, their values change frequently and past performance may not be repeated.

title: Hesai Group And 2 Other Stocks That May Be Priced Below Intrinsic Value
content:
As the United States stock market kicks off February with a strong surge, evidenced by the Dow Jones Industrial Average's 515-point gain and the S&P 500 nearing record highs, investors are keenly observing which stocks could be undervalued amidst this positive momentum. In such an environment, identifying stocks that may be priced below their intrinsic value can present opportunities for investors looking to capitalize on potential growth while navigating current economic developments.

Top 10 Undervalued Stocks Based On Cash Flows In The United States

Name Current Price Fair Value (Est) Discount (Est) Workday (WDAY) $162.92 $322.05 49.4% Warrior Met Coal (HCC) $89.05 $172.16 48.3% Sprout Social (SPT) $8.00 $15.54 48.5% Spotify Technology (SPOT) $422.61 $826.71 48.9% Power Solutions International (PSIX) $80.97 $160.84 49.7% Peraso (PRSO) $0.87 $1.70 48.8% Old National Bancorp (ONB) $25.88 $50.14 48.4% MoneyHero (MNY) $1.22 $2.37 48.6% Horizon Bancorp (HBNC) $18.58 $36.94 49.7% Datadog (DDOG) $111.69 $218.82 49%

Click here to see the full list of 162 stocks from our Undervalued US Stocks Based On Cash Flows screener.

We're going to check out a few of the best picks from our screener tool.

Hesai Group

Overview: Hesai Group develops, manufactures, and sells three-dimensional LiDAR solutions globally, with a market cap of approximately $4.09 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue of CN¥2.75 billion from the development, manufacturing, and delivery of LiDAR products across Mainland China, Europe, North America, and other international markets.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 16.9%

Hesai Group's stock is trading at US$26, below its estimated future cash flow value of US$31.29, suggesting it may be undervalued. The company recently became profitable and forecasts indicate significant earnings growth of 30.2% annually, outpacing the broader U.S. market's 15.7%. However, its share price has been highly volatile recently. Recent strategic partnerships with Grab and NVIDIA enhance its market position in Southeast Asia and autonomous vehicle sectors respectively, potentially driving future revenue growth.

Upon reviewing our latest growth report, Hesai Group's projected financial performance appears quite optimistic. Take a closer look at Hesai Group's balance sheet health here in our report.HSAI Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

MINISO Group Holding

Overview: MINISO Group Holding Limited is an investment holding company involved in the retail and wholesale of design-led lifestyle and pop toy products across Mainland China, Asia, North and Latin America, Europe, and internationally, with a market cap of approximately $5.75 billion.

Continua a leggere

Operations: The company's revenue segments include the TOP TOY Brand, which generated CN¥1.61 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 45.4%

MINISO Group Holding's stock, priced at US$18.91, is trading significantly below its estimated future cash flow value of US$34.65, indicating potential undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite a recent decline in net income and earnings per share, the company forecasts robust annual earnings growth of 31.71%, outpacing the U.S. market average. Recent European expansions and strong IP-driven retail strategies may bolster revenue growth and enhance its competitive position globally.

The analysis detailed in our MINISO Group Holding growth report hints at robust future financial performance. Click to explore a detailed breakdown of our findings in MINISO Group Holding's balance sheet health report.MNSO Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Pure Storage

Overview: Pure Storage, Inc. is a company that offers data storage and management technologies, products, and services both in the United States and internationally, with a market cap of approximately $23.44 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segment is primarily composed of Computer Storage Devices, generating approximately $3.48 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 24.9%

Pure Storage, priced at US$70.99, is trading well below its estimated future cash flow value of US$94.59, highlighting potential undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite recent volatility in share price and a slight decline in quarterly net income, earnings are expected to grow significantly by 32% annually over the next three years. The company has expanded its buyback plan by US$400 million, reflecting confidence in its financial health and future prospects.

In light of our recent growth report, it seems possible that Pure Storage's financial performance will exceed current levels. Navigate through the intricacies of Pure Storage with our comprehensive financial health report here.PSTG Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Below we spotlight a couple of our favorites from our exclusive screener.

Bloom Energy

Overview: Bloom Energy Corporation designs, manufactures, sells, and installs solid-oxide fuel cell systems for on-site power generation both in the United States and internationally, with a market cap of $40.05 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its electric equipment segment, totaling $2.02 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 14.0%

Bloom Energy's recent earnings report showed a significant revenue increase to US$2.02 billion for 2025, though it faced a net loss of US$88.43 million. The company is trading at 14% below its estimated fair value of US$166.32 based on discounted cash flows, suggesting some undervaluation despite recent shareholder dilution and volatility in share price. Bloom's projected revenue growth rate of 27.6% annually outpaces the broader market, with profitability expected within three years.

Our growth report here indicates Bloom Energy may be poised for an improving outlook. Take a closer look at Bloom Energy's balance sheet health here in our report.BE Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Fortune Brands Innovations

Overview: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. provides home and security products for residential repair, remodeling, new construction, and security applications both in the United States and internationally, with a market cap of approximately $7.43 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its Water segment at $2.48 billion, followed by the Outdoors segment at $1.33 billion, and the Security segment at $683.40 million.

Story Continues

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 25.8%

Fortune Brands Innovations is trading at US$61.85, significantly below its estimated fair value of US$83.38 based on discounted cash flows, highlighting potential undervaluation. While revenue growth is modest at 3.1% annually, earnings are projected to rise substantially by 24.3% per year over the next three years, outpacing the broader market's growth rate. Despite high debt levels and an unstable dividend history, the company maintains a robust financial position with a recent US$1.25 billion credit facility extension supporting liquidity needs and strategic initiatives.

Our earnings growth report unveils the potential for significant increases in Fortune Brands Innovations' future results. Delve into the full analysis health report here for a deeper understanding of Fortune Brands Innovations.FBIN Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Viking Holdings

Overview: Viking Holdings Ltd operates in passenger shipping and other forms of passenger transport across North America, the United Kingdom, and internationally, with a market cap of $34.15 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segments include $2.66 billion from Ocean and $2.92 billion from River passenger transport services.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 21.4%

Viking Holdings, trading at US$76.99, is undervalued relative to its estimated cash flow value of US$97.97. The company's earnings are projected to grow significantly at 25.4% annually over the next three years, surpassing the broader market's growth rate of 15.7%. Despite high debt levels, Viking recently became profitable and reported strong earnings with a net income increase to US$847.66 million for the first nine months of 2025, supported by strategic partnerships like its PGA TOUR collaboration through 2030.

Upon reviewing our latest growth report, Viking Holdings' projected financial performance appears quite optimistic. Navigate through the intricacies of Viking Holdings with our comprehensive financial health report here.VIK Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Despite these challenges, the company has shown revenue growth and strategic expansion efforts such as a partnership in Taiwan to enhance its retail media network ecosystem, potentially bolstering future cash flows and market position.

Insights from our recent growth report point to a promising forecast for Coupang's business outlook. Take a closer look at Coupang's balance sheet health here in our report.CPNG Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026

Ellington Financial

Overview: Ellington Financial Inc., operating through its subsidiary Ellington Financial Operating Partnership LLC, focuses on acquiring and managing a diverse portfolio of mortgage-related, consumer-related, corporate-related, and other financial assets in the United States with a market cap of approximately $1.68 billion.

Operations: Ellington Financial's revenue segments include $187.52 million from Longbridge and $165.64 million from its Investment Portfolio in the United States.

Story Continues

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 39.6%

Ellington Financial is trading at US$13.36, significantly below its estimated future cash flow value of US$22.12, highlighting potential undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite a forecasted earnings growth of 22.88% annually, the company's dividend yield of 11.68% is not well covered by earnings or free cash flows and recent shareholder dilution raises concerns. The recent redemption of preferred stock and follow-on equity offering may impact financial stability but could also streamline capital structure.

Our comprehensive growth report raises the possibility that Ellington Financial is poised for substantial financial growth. Click here and access our complete balance sheet health report to understand the dynamics of Ellington Financial.EFC Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026

Equitable Holdings

Overview: Equitable Holdings, Inc. operates as a diversified financial services company worldwide with a market cap of approximately $13.16 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segments include Asset Management with $4.58 billion and Wealth Management with $1.91 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 42.7%

Equitable Holdings is trading at US$46.11, considerably below its estimated future cash flow value of US$80.46, suggesting significant undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite a challenging financial year with substantial net losses, the company maintains a robust share buyback program and anticipates becoming profitable within three years with an expected earnings growth of 59.41% annually. However, its dividend yield of 2.34% is not adequately covered by earnings, raising sustainability concerns amidst ongoing financial adjustments.

In light of our recent growth report, it seems possible that Equitable Holdings' financial performance will exceed current levels. Get an in-depth perspective on Equitable Holdings' balance sheet by reading our health report here.EQH Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026

title: 3 Stocks That May Be Trading Below Estimated Value By Up To 48.2%
content:
As the U.S. stock market experiences mixed performance with the S&P 500 reaching an all-time high and the Dow Jones Industrial Average facing pressure, investors are navigating a complex landscape of earnings reports and interest rate decisions. In this environment, identifying stocks that may be undervalued can offer potential opportunities for those looking to capitalize on discrepancies between market price and estimated value.

Top 10 Undervalued Stocks Based On Cash Flows In The United States

Click here to see the full list of 171 stocks from our Undervalued US Stocks Based On Cash Flows screener.

Let's take a closer look at a couple of our picks from the screened companies.

Mirum Pharmaceuticals

Overview: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing and commercializing innovative therapies for rare and orphan diseases, with a market cap of $4.87 billion.

Operations: Mirum Pharmaceuticals generates revenue primarily from its pharmaceuticals segment, amounting to $471.79 million.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 25.6%

Mirum Pharmaceuticals is trading at 25.6% below its estimated fair value, with shares valued at US$96.92 against a future cash flow value of US$130.27, indicating potential undervaluation based on cash flows. The company expects 2026 revenues between US$630 million and US$650 million and forecasts earnings growth of 54.15% annually as it aims for profitability within three years, surpassing average market growth rates. Recent private placements raised over US$268 million to support strategic initiatives including an acquisition with Bluejay Therapeutics.

According our earnings growth report, there's an indication that Mirum Pharmaceuticals might be ready to expand. Click here and access our complete balance sheet health report to understand the dynamics of Mirum Pharmaceuticals.MIRM Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026

Hasbro

Overview: Hasbro, Inc. is a toy and game company that operates in various regions including the United States, Europe, and Asia with a market cap of approximately $12.45 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its Consumer Products segment at $2.60 billion, followed by Wizards of The Coast & Digital Gaming at $2.08 billion, and Entertainment at $127.90 million.

Story Continues

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 39.7%

Hasbro is trading at US$89.41, significantly below its estimated future cash flow value of US$148.3, suggesting undervaluation based on cash flows despite high debt levels. Earnings are forecast to grow 39.32% annually, with profitability expected in three years, surpassing market averages. Recent board additions include Doug Bowser and Carla Vernón, potentially enhancing strategic direction. An exclusive licensing agreement with Galaxy Gaming for MONOPOLY-branded games may bolster revenue streams through innovative product offerings.

Upon reviewing our latest growth report, Hasbro's projected financial performance appears quite optimistic. Delve into the full analysis health report here for a deeper understanding of Hasbro.HAS Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026

Pattern Group

Overview: Pattern Group Inc. accelerates various brands on ecommerce marketplaces using proprietary technology and AI, with a market cap of $2.51 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue primarily comes from online retailers, amounting to $2.29 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 48.2%

Pattern Group is trading at US$16.06, well below its estimated future cash flow value of US$31.02, indicating significant undervaluation. Despite a recent net loss, revenue grew 35.9% year-over-year and is expected to continue outpacing the broader market with anticipated annual growth of 17.9%. New service expansions in logistics and reimbursements could enhance cash flows by streamlining operations for clients, potentially supporting long-term profitability as the company aims to become profitable within three years.

The analysis detailed in our Pattern Group growth report hints at robust future financial performance. Get an in-depth perspective on Pattern Group's balance sheet by reading our health report here.PTRN Discounted Cash Flow as at Jan 2026
